title: 曲がり角には、気をつけます！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm rounding a corner...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh no, oh no, oh no! L-look out!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry! I was in such a huge rush that I—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, right! Sorry, but I made a promise, so I'll be—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I completely forgot that I promised to race with
my friend, so I'm rushing over there now...
choice_data_list:
Then you should probably save that energy for
the race.

Then you should probably save that energy for
the race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I completely forgot that I promised to race with
my friend, so I'm rushing over there now...
choice_data_list:
Then you should probably save that energy for
the race.

Then you should probably save that energy for
the race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If I give it my all now, I'll be out of energy when
it's time for the real race with my friend!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty, I'll just jog slowly in the hallway to
recover my strength!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Got it! Thanks, and I'm sorry for crashing into you!
Bye!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week runs off again in a panic, however...
